titleStmt.title: SII 41.22: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 22. (A.R. No. 21 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

p.hi: Chōḻa, Parakēsari Rajendra, Kulōthuṅga I Year 2 = 1072 A.D.

summary.p: This contains the praśasti ‘Bhūmiyum Tiruvum’. This records the gift of 16 sheep by Madhurāntaka nāḍāḷvān of Nerkuppai, in Vilaiyūr-nāḍu on the north bank of Peṇṇai, for burning half a lamp in the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭāṉam-uḍaiyār at Tirukkōvalūr, in Ku[ṟukkai-kūṟṟam], a district of Jananātha vaḷanāḍu, for the merit of his paternal uncle (siṟṟappaṉ) Upakārimallaṉ who is stated to have died as a result of some accident (pramādam), at the hands of Parukkaluḍaiyān Piritiveṇkāḍaṉ. The members of the tiruvuṇṇāḻigai-sabhai, agreed to maintain the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmiyum tiruvum tāme puṇarntu vikkiramattāl cakkara naṭātti vi
jaya simhāsanattu viṟṟirun=taruḷina kopparakecari panmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu jananāta vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟu
ruk kovalūr tiruviraṭṭāna Uṭaiyār koyililey peṇṇai vaṭakarai vilaiyūr nāṭṭu neṟkuppai Irukkum nelkuppai Uṭaiyānāna ko
nāna maturān=taka nāṭāḻvānen Eṉ ciṟṟappaṉ Upakāri mallaṉ parukkaluṭaiyān pirativeṇkāṭan kaiyiley piramātattāl paṭṭamaiyi
cārtti vaitta viḷakku Arai Araikkum vaitta cāvāmuvā naṟpacu patināṟu Ivai kaikkoṇṭu niman=tam celutta kaṭavomāno
l tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyom Itu pānmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
